name: Miao
brand_story: I started a slow fashion accessory brand rooted in Taoist philosophy-each piece crafted from deadstock materials and being remarked
materials: Macrame dress overlay with cotton thread
brand_statement: Miao exists to honour stillness and intention through slow-crafted accessories that embody Taoist philosophy—each piece a quiet rebellion against mass production, made from reclaimed materials with mindful hands.
target_audience: Discerning collectors and design-forward tastemakers in East London and beyond who seek wearable art imbued with meaning, rarity, and the soul of the handmade.
price_positioning: £450–£1,200 | Justified by the investment of time, ethical material sourcing, and the singular nature of each handwoven piece—this is fashion as heirloom object.
key_message: Woven with intention, born from stillness, made to last beyond trend.
